aciShow.command: az container show --resource-group PUI --name pui-zap-security --only-show-errors --output none

aciDelete.command: az container delete --resource-group PUI --name pui-zap-security --yes --only-show-errors --output none

command:
import json
import os
import sys
import urllib.parse
import urllib.request

query = urllib.parse.urlencode({"apikey": os.environ.get("ZAP_API_KEY", "")})
url = "http://127.0.0.1:8080/JSON/core/view/version/?" + query
with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=5) as response:
    data = json.load(response)
sys.exit(0 if data.get("version") else 1)

import json
import os
import sys
import urllib.parse
import urllib.request

query = urllib.parse.urlencode({"apikey": os.environ.get("ZAP_API_KEY", "")})
url = "http://127.0.0.1:8080/JSON/core/view/version/?" + query
with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=5) as response:
    data = json.load(response)
sys.exit(0 if data.get("version") else 1)
